v1a_alignment.story: Executive Signal -> Commitment -> Demand -> Shortage -> Recommendation -> Decision -> Evidence -> Operational Relationships -> Timeline -> Source Records
v1a_alignment.truth_rule: Evidence must cite governed shortage, recommendation, operational object, or source-record identifiers; do not fabricate independent proof.

records.evidence_summary: Horizon CPP shortage has 2 units short out of 6 required. Coverage is 66.67% with 4 units allocated. Revenue-at-risk is 250000 USD.
Horizon LNG Partners escalation links to CPP-1000 commissioning delay and active penalty-window exposure.
CPP-1000 factory acceptance test gates outbound shipment and source-record continuity for the Horizon investigation.

note: The recommendation_evidence table currently has zero rows for this demo org, so this file uses governed evidence already present on shortage and operational object records. V1-A source-record proof is represented through source_record_id and source_table, not through fabricated documents.
